= has_suffix


== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `value`
| `string`
| The string to test.

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.t1 = this.v1.has_suffix("foo")
root.t2 = this.v2.has_suffix("foo")

# In:  {"v1":"foobar","v2":"barfoo"}
# Out: {"t1":false,"t2":true}
----
